name: Lemon Poppy Seed Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Combine flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, poppy seeds and lemon rind in a bowl.
In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter until fluffy; beat in eggs until smooth. Add buttermilk and vanilla; mix well. Stir in the dry ingredients just until moistened. Fill paper cup-lined or greased muffin cups 3/4 full. Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm. Makes 12 to 15 muffins.
